citations: [Dwell time shaping in inverse treatment planning for cervical brachytherapy.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39620172/)
[Knowledge-based inverse treatment planning for low-dose-rate prostate brachytherapy.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33586191/)
[Inverse planning in Gamma Knife radiosurgery: A comparative planning study.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33706117/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 39620172. 2024/11/10 00:00. BACKGROUND: In current practice, radiotherapy inverse planning often requires 
treatment planners to modify multiple parameters in the treatment planning 
system
evidence.source_title: Dwell time shaping in inverse treatment planning for cervical brachytherapy.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 39620172. 2024/11/10 00:00. BACKGROUND: In current practice, radiotherapy inverse planning often requires 
treatment planners to modify multiple parameters in the treatment planning 
system's objective function to produce clinically acceptable plans. Due to the 
manual steps in this process, plan quality can vary depending on the planning 
time available and the planner's skills.
PURPOSE: This study investigates the feasibility of two hyperparameter-tuning 
methods for automated inver
